M2300_EMER_USE_AFTR_LAST_ASMT M2300 Emergent Care Since Last OASIS This field indicates whether the patient has utilized a hospital emergency department since the last time OASIS data were collected. 00 = No
01 = Yes, used hospital emergency department WITHOUT hospital admission
02 = Yes, used hospital emergency department WITH hospital admission
UK = Unknown CHAR 2 x x x
